name: hacker-news-market-mentions
description: Search Hacker News public posts and normalize market mentions, launch reactions, and buyer-pain discussions.
business_value: No-key market intelligence and technical audience monitoring.
verification_result: Live smoke checked HN Algolia search for 'ai agents' and received story rows without an API key.
known_risks: Deleted stories can have partial fields.
HN is not representative of all buyers.
